spec_match.rationale: Masonry layout where DOM order and visual column order diverge — exactly the use case reading-flow targets.

interactive.rationale: Three mode buttons plus the dynamic insertion control update the grid and focus trace live.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Index promises a Pinterest-style masonry with reading-flow toggle; the page is that.

edge_cases.rationale: Now includes dynamic insertion in the middle of the DOM. Container query and reduced-motion interactions remain out of scope for this concept.

references.rationale: The see-also section now includes the ChromeStatus feature 5113638848561152 link.

design_system.rationale: Boosted card text uses --bg-paper instead of raw white; raw color scan was clean.

summary: Pinterest-style masonry demo with tokenized boosted-card styling and dynamic insertion coverage. Chrome DevTools MCP verified insertion, reading-order highlighting, and focus tracing with a clean console.
